title: Missing column in PostgreSQL database
symptom: Nodes in n8n are returning errors related to missing database columns, specifically during HTTP requests. The error indicates that a specific column does not exist in the database.
applies_when: Running n8n in a self-hosted environment
not_this_if: No errors related to missing columns
root_cause: The error occurs because the expected column 'role' is missing from the PostgreSQL database schema. This can happen if the database schema was not properly updated during an upgrade or if there are discrepancies between instances in a scaled environment.
fix_steps: Ensure all instances of n8n are running the same version.
Re-deploy the instances to ensure they are synchronized.
Check the database schema for the missing column and add it if necessary.
agent_instruction: Verify the database schema and ensure all n8n instances are on the same version before re-deploying.
